source: Canonical palette from guidelines/keveko-brand-guide.pdf (page 8), confirmed by internal brand notes. Pantone references are available in the PDF.

ocean.usage: Body text (never plain black). Primary dark background.

sky.usage: Primary background. Pairs with Ocean or White for text.

misty-rose.usage: Secondary background. Body text only when on Ocean background.

candy.usage: Accent only; error states. Never as a background or body text.

maroon.usage: Accent only. Never as a background or body text.

white.usage: Primary background. Reversed text colour (body text only on Ocean background).
